This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Test Audio initialPrompt
  assert_regexp_match: expected object "/sentence/i" but got "On-device model is not available in Chromium, this API is just echoing back the input:\\ntranscribe this<audio>"
[FAIL] Prompt with Blob audio content
  assert_regexp_match: expected object "/sentence/i" but got "On-device model is not available in Chromium, this API is just echoing back the input:\\ntranscribe this<audio>"
[FAIL] Prompt with AudioBuffer
  assert_regexp_match: expected object "/sentence/i" but got "On-device model is not available in Chromium, this API is just echoing back the input:\\ntranscribe this<audio>"
[FAIL] Prompt with BufferSource - ArrayBuffer
  assert_regexp_match: expected object "/sentence/i" but got "On-device model is not available in Chromium, this API is just echoing back the input:\\ntranscribe this<audio>"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
